description_long: This object is a highly stylized, steampunk-inspired bicycle featuring a complex frame with exposed mechanical components and a prominent smokestack at the rear. The frame is constructed from dark metal tubing, with large spoked wheels and a covered central section that resembles a canvas canopy. The front fork is elongated and angular, supporting a single front wheel, while the rear section houses two large wheels with wooden spokes and metallic rims. Various gears, pipes, and cylindrical elements are visible along the sides, suggesting a hybrid of bicycle and early steam-powered vehicle aesthetics. The handlebars are set low and forward, and the seat is positioned beneath the canopy, offering a semi-reclined riding posture. The overall appearance is rugged and industrial, with a mix of metallic, wooden, and fabric textures.
description: A steampunk-style bicycle with a metal frame, large spoked wheels, a canvas canopy, and exposed gears and pipes, evoking an industrial, steam-powered look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the elongated fork, single front wheel, and the canopy covering the central section.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long frame, large rear wheels, smokestack, and the detailed mechanical components along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smokestack, dual large wheels, and the back of the canopy, emphasizing the vehicle's width.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the frame, wheels, and mechanical details, with the canopy and smokestack visible.
